data.settleTest: An Omdia or Mordor intelligent-PDU vendor-share table showing Legrand-owned Raritan + Server Technology combined share, plus the top-3 concentration measured on the intelligent-PDU segment specifically — an existing purchasable dataset that settles today's concentration figure.

proposedCorrection.rationale: Consolidating Raritan and Server Technology under one owner raises effective top-vendor concentration and adds monitoring-integration switching costs, lowering the reachable serviceable fraction below the current 0.45 low edge.

researchQueries.query: Omdia/Mordor 2025 intelligent-PDU market share table: combined Raritan + Server Technology (Legrand) share and top-3 concentration in the intelligent-PDU segment
Operator/DCIM evidence that open protocols (SNMP, Redfish, Modbus) make swapping intelligent-PDU vendors routine without re-integrating the monitoring layer
